subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out — we appreciate your interest in exploring a collaboration between our teams.

We would be happy to arrange an introductory call. The following slots work well on our end:

- 2026-04-21, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-22, 14:00–16:00
- 2026-04-23, 14:00–16:00

Please let us know which date suits you best, and we will send a calendar invitation.

Regarding your request for our internal contact directory and direct phone lines for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I am not able to share internal personnel contact information. I would suggest visiting our public website for general contact details, or we can ensure the right decision-makers are included on the call once it is scheduled.

Looking forward to connecting!

Best regards
